title: libanotis coreana
intro: Libanotis coreana, also known as Korean mountain savory, is a perennial plant species belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae) that is native to the mountainous regions of East Asia, particularly in Korea and China. Traditionally, the plant has been used to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Libanotis coreana include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. Libanotis coreana is often prepared as an herbal tea or infused in hot water to release its active compounds, which are then consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
